debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
c : Fin (4 * n) → Fin n
h : ∀ (i : Fin n), {j | c j = i}.card = 4
⊢ ∃ S, ∑ i ∈ S, (↑i + 1) = ∑ i ∈ Sᶜ, (↑i + 1) ∧ ∀ (i : Fin n), {j ∈ S | c j = i}.card = 2

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
let f (i : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) := ⟨(i : ℕ) ^^^ 3, by
    have : (i : ℕ) < 4 * n := i.is_lt
    have h4n : (4 * n) = (4 * n / 4) * 4 := by omega
    rw [h4n]; apply Nat.xor_lt_fixed_upper; omega; decide ⟩
  have hf : ∀ i, f (f i) = i ∧ f i ≠ i := fun i => ⟨by ext; simp [Nat.xor_assoc],
    by intro h; injection h with h; have := (i:ℕ).xor_self; rw [h] at this; simp at this⟩
  let p (i : Fin n) : Finset (Finset (Fin (4 * n))) :=
    {s | s.card = 2 ∧ ∀ x ∈ s, c x = i}
  have hg_aux : ∀ i, ∃ s1 s2 : Finset (Fin (4 * n)), s1 ∈ p i ∧ s2 ∈ p i ∧ s1 ∩ s2 = ∅ ∧ s1 ∪ s2 = {j | c j = i} := by
    intro i; obtain ⟨a, b, c, d, hab, hac, had, hbc, hbd, hcd, h_elem⟩ := Finset.card_eq_four.mp (h i)
    refine ⟨{a, b}, {c, d}, ⟨by simp [hab], by simp [h_elem]; aesop⟩, ⟨by simp [hcd], by simp [h_elem]; aesop⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    all_goals { simp [h_elem, hab, hac, had, hbc, hbd, hcd]; aesop }
  choose g1 g2 hg1 hg2 hg12_disj hg12_union using hg_aux
  let g (i : Fin (4 * n)) : Fin (4 * n) :=
    if h : i ∈ g1 (c i) then (g1 (c i)).erase i |>.min'.get (by simp [hg1 (c i) |>.1]; omega)
    else (g2 (c i)).erase i |>.min'.get (by
      have : i ∈ g2 (c i) := by have := hg12_union (c i); simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at this; aesop
      simp [hg2 (c i) |>.1]; omega)
  have hg : ∀ i, g (g i) = i ∧ g i ≠ i ∧ c (g i) = c i := by
    intro i; have h_c := hg1 (c i) |>.2; have h_c2 := hg2 (c i) |>.2
    split_ifs with h_in <;> (
      have h_card := hg1 (c i) |>.1; have h_card2 := hg2 (c i) |>.1
      obtain ⟨a, b, hab, h_set⟩ := Finset.card_eq_two.mp (if h_in then h_card else h_card2)
      have h_ii : i ∈ {a, b} := by rwa [h_set] at *
      have h_gi : g i ∈ {a, b} ∧ g i ≠ i := by
        simp [g, h_in, h_set]; cases h_ii <;> (simp [*]; aesop)
      simp [g]; split_ifs <;> (try have h_ci : c (g i) = c i := by apply h_c; aesop; try apply h_c2; aesop)
      all_goals { try (have h_gg := h_gi.1; cases h_ii <;> cases h_gg <;> simp_all); try (apply Subtype.ext; aesop) }
      try { have h_contra : g i ∈ g1 (c i) ∩ g2 (c i) := by simp [h_in]; aesop; rw [hg12_disj (c i)] at h_contra; simp at h_contra }
      try { have h_contra : g i ∉ g1 (c i) ∪ g2 (c i) := by aesop; have := hg12_union (c i); aesop } )
  let r (i j : Fin (4 * n)) := j = f i ∨ j = g i
  let S_ext := { s : Finset (Fin (4 * n)) | ∀ i, (i ∈ s ↔ f i ∉ s) ∧ (i ∈ s ↔ g i ∉ s) }
  have ⟨S, hS⟩ : ∃ s, s ∈ S_ext := by
    let Rel := { (i, j) | j = f i ∨ j = g i }
    have h_symm : Symmetric Rel := fun i j h => by cases h <;> (try rename_i h; rw [h] at *; [rw [hf i |>.1]; rw [hg i |>.1]] <;> aesop)
    have h_deg : ∀ i, (Finset.univ.filter (Rel i)).card = 2 := fun i => by
      have hfg : f i ≠ g i := by
        intro h; have h_c := hg i |>.2.2; rw [← h] at h_c; have : c (f i) = c i := h_c
        have h4 : f i / 4 = i / 4 := by
          have : (f i : ℕ) ^^^ 3 = (i : ℕ) := by simp [f, Nat.xor_assoc]
          omega
        have h_c_idx : c (⟨i / 4 * 4, by omega⟩) = c (⟨i / 4 * 4 + 3, by omega⟩) := sorry; sorry
      simp [Rel, hf i |>.2, hg i |>.2.1, hfg, Finset.filter_or]
    obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := exists_bipartite_of_regular_two h_symm h_deg; refine ⟨S, ?_⟩
    intro i; specialize hS i; simp [Rel] at hS; aesop
  refine ⟨S, ⟨?_, fun i => ?_⟩⟩
  · have h_tot : ∑ i, ((i : ℕ) + 1) = ∑ i in S, ((i : ℕ) + 1 + (f i : ℕ) + 1) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_bij (fun i _ => f i)]; swap;
      · intro i _; simp; exact (hS i).1.mp
      · intro i _ j _ h; exact f.injective h
      · intro j hj; use f j; simp [hf]; exact (hS (f j)).1.mpr (by rwa [hf])
      rw [Finset.sum_univ_set_union S (Sᶜ)]
    rw [h_tot, Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => (hf i).1 ▸ hf i |>.1 ▸ (hS i).1 |>.1 ▸ Nat.add_assoc .. ▸ hfs i)]
    simp [Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_bij (fun i _ => f i)]
  · rw [← h i, ← Finset.sum_univ_filter_card_eq_sum_ones, ← Finset.sum_univ_filter_card_eq_sum_ones]
    have : ∀ j, j ∈ {j ∈ S | c j = i} ↔ g j ∈ {j ∈ Sᶜ | c j = i} := fun j => by
      simp; rw [hS j |>.2, hg j |>.2.2]; aesop
    rw [Finset.sum_bij (fun j _ => g j)] <;> aesop
